calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. EDUARDO A. BRAVO, Esq. of Squire Patton Boggs (US) LLP (Tel: 213-624-2500) for defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANDRE SMITH's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

There being no appearance made at the hearing by or for the plaintiff/moving party, the Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion to compel is denied.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Continued To Aug-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2023 Continued To Jul-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Continued To May-17-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to transfer venue" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
